value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude models are available through Google Cloud's Agent Platform. ... Claude is also available through Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry.
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that Claude models are available on Google Cloud's Agent Platform (a third-party platform), and also mentions availability on Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry. This directly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Claude on third-party platforms. The page provides detailed documentation on how to deploy and manage Claude models on Google Cloud's Agent Platform, including API usage, model availability, endpoints, and feature support — all indicative of an active, generally available offering.
